jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Biocon
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Biocon in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Biocon:
Biocon is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Biocon!
